word: G1974 - ἐπιποθία - epipothía - ep-ee-poth-ee'-ah - Great desire

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιποθία

- Transliteration: Epipothia

- Phonetic: ep-ee-poth-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. longing

- Origin: from G1971

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G1971; intense longing: - great desire.
